एमबीआर सुगंिधत करण (ii) 40 琈दन犘 के िलए 0.0 िड灡ी सी अथवा उसे नीचे पर 灹ी-िशपम犆ट/इन-灩ांिजट शीत उपचार ये उपचार मूल/पुन: िनया榁त के -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] का.आ. 1248(अ) तथा 琈दनांक 10 मई, 2018 के का.आ. 1873(अ) के मा瀇यम से संशोिधत 琈कया गया। MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FARMERS WELFARE (Department Of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 24th May, 2018 S.O. 2059(E).–In Government of India, Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Gazette of India Notification (Extraordinary) in Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section (ii) vide S.O. 1873(E) dated 10th May, 2018, para No. 2, Amendment of Schedule VI may be read as: Against serial number 262, relating to Pome fruits, in column (2) after the entry (iii) regarding ‘Pyrus communis (Pears)’, in column (3) against (iii) ‘Fresh fruits for consumption, the entries relating thereto, columns (2), (3) (4), (5) and (6) shall respectively be inserted, namely: -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 Plant species Category of plant Material Country of origin Additional declarations required to be incorporated into Phytosanitary certificate Special conditions of import (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) (iv) Pyrus spp. (iii) Fresh fruit for consumption (ii) South Korea Free from : a) Aculus schlechtendali (Apple rust mite) b) Adoxophyes orana (Summer fruit tortrix) c) Botryosphaeria berengeriana f.sp. pyricola (Physalospora canker) d) Carposina sasakii (peach fruit moth) e) Grapholita molesta (oriental fruit moth) f) Harmonia axyridis(harlequin ladybird) g) Metcalfa pruinosa (frosted moth-bug) h) Peridroma saucia(pearly underwing moth) (i) MBr fumigation at 32 g/cubic meter for 2 hrs at 21 degree C or above under NAP or equivalent thereof or (ii) Pre-shipment / in- transit cold treatment at 0.0 degree C or below for 40 days. The treatment should be endorsed on phytosanitary certificate issued at the country of origin/re- export. [F. No. 8-108/2018-PP.II] Dr. B. RAJENDER, Jt. Secy.
